comment.body:
Musk got fired because they tried the austerity approach with DOGE. Trump does not have the patience as often Alma has written. To get the usa empire back on track there are only two ways at the 39T national debt level, austerity or reset the system. The move into CBDCs, Stablecoin is the the other approach. Stablecoin issuers have to buy T bills. Rest of the world rushes to buy crypto and stablecoins propping up the empire. 

:) However the other big players are also getting ready to play this game via Digital Yuan etc.

comment.body:
Matches with Alma's posts on middle east ties to Crypto etc. A lot of intelligent folks are saying the same thing and I think it makes sense on paper. Convert debt into Stablecoins and then reset the global order. The economist had an article in July itself hinting that Trump administration will do this. Stablecoin issuers have to keep a bulk in T bills.


https://www.economist.com/finance-and-economics/2025/07/16/stablecoins-might-cut-americas-debt-payments-but-at-what-cost
